title: Sharing Photos
drDigitalIntro:
Sharing sends a copy of a photo to someone else.
• Click Share, then choose how — Mail or Messages.
• Pick a contact to send it to.
• You keep your photo; they get a copy.

playgroundTask.goal: You shared a photo with a friend

steps.say: Click on the Beach Vacation photo to open it.

drDigitalSuccess: You shared a photo! Sharing sends a copy — your original photo stays safe in your library.
drDigitalHint: Open a photo, then click Share. Choose Messages, then pick Grandma.
